title: Monthly Sea Fisheries Statistics June 2025
body: "Highlights   The total quantity of landings by UK vessels (tonnes) decreased in June 2025 compared to 2024, down 1%. The value of landings in June 2025 (£60.6m) also decreased compared to 2024 down by 3%. Landings in June 2025 comprised mostly of Demersal species (45%). This was driven by landings of Haddock which is usually a targeted fishery in the summer months between June and August each year.  "
